I would highly recommend purchasing your tickets online in advance to avoid disappointment, as tickets can sell out quickly.
The first security check does not require you to show your ticket. After that, proceed to the “E-Tickets – Elevator” entrance with the green signboard. Visitors are only allowed to enter during their designated time slot, so there is no need to arrive too early. After entering, there is a second security check where your ticket will be scanned. The elevator ride to the 2nd floor takes about a minute. If you are visiting the summit, you will need to change to another elevator. Everything was very well organized and the crowd control was excellent. The staff did a great job managing the large number of visitors, making the whole process smooth and efficient. Overall, it was a fantastic experience and one of the highlights of our trip to Overall, it was a fantastic experience and one of the highlights of our trip to Paris.","text_translated":"","published_at":"2026-06-12T07:18:14.356945Z"},{"Name":"Share Share","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmMdh9SMFmKaAwvfOhJJNZ8ZElSvz67IznG4m8iUXvcsJGxwhlKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eiffel Tower is the defining symbol of Paris and one of the world’s most recognizable landmarks. The views from the top are spectacular, especially at sunset when the city glows in golden light and landmarks like the Seine, Arc de Triomphe, and Sacré-Cœur come into view. The tower itself is impressive up close, with its intricate ironwork and grand scale making it even more stunning in person.

The atmosphere around the tower is lively day and night, with street performers, gardens, and cafés nearby creating a classic Parisian experience. At night, the sparkling light show every hour adds a magical touch that makes the visit unforgettable. Booking tickets in advance is highly recommended to avoid long queues, especially during peak travel seasons.

Whether you visit for the panoramic views, photography, or simply to experience one of the world’s greatest landmarks, the Eiffel Tower is absolutely worth seeing at least once.","Images":["https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0Xq6om48p29G1_zD3wCaKha5mC0dpKCFHPLiJu_BT9r6KdagS7_KR9nXHF_gp--BLUZFmWGKQApL3StKnP_h0vKLcN8Utuu4HIEQdl9TyiCW8TADHsw98b_-r3WO6C9XA61Ppj6dt2hwU=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1YAG1k3a3v8cd_9G_9o1QPZTDD497Ya_5RdRzFoCR6bjcHha9Gz6f7iqDfmlGsDmApbjwTyad1VaK1kETgkMCTPjiWQ5usxXTVFQPWA4jZ1K91WGMynrJdGP8Pj_Xb2WHHrVLcgVEOUV4l=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3_V0BJctJTfzS3HPPLrtyc4tF7ONDkb7EdhVvusKdG_Pejis_fcUI7V_rMevOtBmJ3-BZ80_Uwk5BM-mXKvnkXmgsVPNCWQBNesgbP7Mwro8P7HsFOxgTUobZQ5YnG9q7C11ciKEftek4t=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1u6XjNUrT2G2xZl7fojVLF5TS5c7JNxloYt6bj2Znm24bD5smYnvo16anUdZkD26eO_Wop7bD1AThem5LjkXMKieCVwnM59J1o5I4eydCjO_A7iBeV_oSw5I_xeeuMA4dYf4wYqC6_SNNZ=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn2HiWAJ_1liGkaRYfC2wE727IbOSSqZiridsYsQE0oKya12Xus3ZtgV1VD1ce_p6N8gOGRQ44OiRVvhMssiW9yGgtQyKsr8SccjKlez3N6Jx4Rm06_9nj4GO43NGGWkO8eaa9e4UUNA8qMT=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1oV7VTa0Zr-Buo14QijHkqLOPNpdkoWzLb_jkxy0xwDkoKIrwYCQYnrkRDK0pjZt_niiF98OF6Oim31-9F-ZsS381fjLNnfH1BkcVazsukc4Mnzl3XK1SHTUcBuD6NRFg9ymdochM0KNqi=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn3NB0G46gz9q_JpbiUfdW5W1LTVcpyWZtDyComv6T_eVS-Iv7YjZ7yISxO0v8SoNuDxFfwk4t_H45cRo3SoeqGnUHkPwWZjaY4ZCkmG4vFT-otzF92ivATDIVBYoeWM7FSYobZlOitNr9sA=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0pAY5bt0BW0pJQ7irpMOC7MJJFjY5W7WEmIle0XBnBVJLlY7uC1qjlO8-Gjg7bqyRZpG7IeL0DuVNv-unPP4Zzfkytu1vQOaTysuPC7BTiJ3LrIPyNbbwuNmeDjrdi0xha1Ze0gKqerpvH=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn0IZiWgIzbAAdlnM5dHV33WTca2hqQkt737-Lm7g5kyyrZFu3JSZ7h-zpV-0TFjQBg06OOlBkczAhpgnnqHAy_9JkH1SUvk1TuJUunDDhomLlB2S72k8Ck0utm_mvIezrrSC-GNFQN6Ayze=k-no","https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/grass-cs/ANxoTn1_T0up5huDRnd79iTVZi2wxtoWB8X4L9IsMSAoO4maxTyTOSWzIzXig-KZP5GmGL4Mk7PuhogjtUVW4B9t6Fdz-YW17vnPwVg9DKH5IWOoBtHOUMPIBpAD4c7dQVjjANldjtblcHtFkoxJ= The esplande and gardens are enticing.","text_translated":"","published_at":"2026-06-09T10:56:48.241093Z"},{"Name":"A Oki","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHZZR3s4lQjGf6QswZNTvORYO5tWeHxPOuaU0xBdzWl9q_YHM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba12-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It doesn’t feel like a real trip to Paris if you don’t visit the Eiffel Tower. It’s truly one of the world’s most iconic architectural landmarks and something everyone should see at least once in their lifetime.

The tower is beautiful both during the day and at night. In the daytime, you can really admire its structure and design. it’s amazing to think how engineers were able to build something like this so long ago. At night, the atmosphere completely changes, especially when the tower starts sparkling. It feels magical.

We decided to go up inside the tower, and it was a totally different experience seeing the Eiffel Tower from above. You get an incredible 360-degree view of Paris. If you’re afraid of heights or don’t want to climb the stairs, don’t worry, there’s a large elevator that takes many people at once.

ago","review_id":"Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21KeVRqaFFTSE5tTm5wc01XbE1NRE5MTm5WNVpGRRAB","source":"Google","rating_scale":5,"rating_float":5,"author_url":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109538911018737184961/reviews?hl=en-GB","posted_at_unix_micros":1770973936682440,"updated_at_unix_micros":1770973949538327,"language":"en","translated_lang":"","text_original":"It doesn’t feel like a real trip to Paris if you don’t visit the Eiffel Tower. It’s truly one of the world’s most iconic architectural landmarks and something everyone should see at least once in their lifetime.

The tower is beautiful both during the day and at night. In the daytime, you can really admire its structure and design. it’s amazing to think how engineers were able to build something like this so long ago. At night, the atmosphere completely changes, especially when the tower starts sparkling. It feels magical.

We decided to go up inside the tower, and it was a totally different experience seeing the Eiffel Tower from above. You get an incredible 360-degree view of Paris. If you’re afraid of heights or don’t want to climb the stairs, don’t worry, there’s a large elevator that takes many people at once.

An unforgettable experience and absolutely a must-visit in Paris.","text_translated":"","published_at":"2026-02-13T09:12:16.68244Z"}]
